entries.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
entries.description: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

entries.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year — SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
entries.description: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

entries.title: Nvidia posts another record quarter, reveals $43B of holdings in startups
entries.description: Nvidia announced another record revenue figure after market close on Wednesday, but forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.

entries.title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators — now it’s buying $2.8B more
entries.description: Elon Musk's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.

entries.title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
entries.description: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.

entries.title: OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time
entries.description: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946 — and this time, the mathematicians who exposed its last embarrassing claim are backing it up.

entries.title: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, looks to become the AI desktop buddy you never knew you needed
entries.description: Initially billed as an "AI butler," Iris watches what happens on a user's desktop and automatically learns how to do tasks for them, its co-founder says.

entries.title: OpenAI barrels toward IPO that may happen in September
entries.description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership, and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

entries.title: AI search startups are blowing up
entries.description: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

entries.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create 6-minute songs
entries.description: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks.

entries.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in 1 week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups closes May 27
entries.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup today.

entries.title: NanoClaw creator turns down $20M buyout offer, raises $12M seed instead
entries.description: NanoClaw was created as a secure alternative to OpenClaw to assist the Cohen brothers with their AI marketing firm that used agents to do much of the work. But instead of running directly on a compute

entries.title: Figma adds an AI assistant to its collaborative canvas
entries.description: Figma says users can employ natural language text prompts to direct its new AI agent to generate new designs, edit existing ones, or automate tasks such as generating iterations of existing designs.

entries.title: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design at IO 2026
entries.description: Google says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

entries.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
entries.description: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

entries.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
entries.description: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

entries.title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing
entries.description: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, claims its AI can thoroughly analyze the context of every incoming email to detect fraud and impersonation attempts.

entries.title: Elon Musk said Sam Altman ‘stole’ a non-profit — but the trial showed he had similar aims
entries.description: The jury's speedy decision to reject Elon Musk's lawsuit against the other founders of OpenAI and Microsoft confirmed what we saw in the courtroom: Musk's case was a weak one, in part because he waite

entries.title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
entries.description: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

entries.title: Anthropic says it’s about to have its first profitable quarter
entries.description: Anthropic has told its investors that it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter.
